name: Obsidian Blazer
description: Hand-tailored blazer crafted from premium Italian wool blend. Features a modern silhouette with peak lapels and silk lining.

name: Crystal V-Neck
description: Silk-blend crystal v-neck top with subtle sheen. Perfect for evening elegance with a modern drape.

name: Aura Maxi Dress
description: Floor-length maxi dress with liquid silk fabrication. Features an asymmetrical neckline and open back.

name: Prism Mini Skirt
description: High-waist mini skirt in structured satin. Features origami-inspired pleating and hidden zip closure.

name: Phantom Trench
description: Double-breasted trench coat in water-resistant microfibre. Removable belt and storm flap details.

name: Eclipse Jumpsuit
description: Wide-leg jumpsuit in crepe-back satin. Features a deep V-neckline and flowing wide legs with side pockets.

name: Nova Crop Top
description: Cropped top in liquid jersey with asymmetric hem. Ribbed texture with a subtle metallic thread woven through.

name: Shadow Pants
description: Wide-leg palazzo pants in matte crepe. Elastic waistband with gold-tone drawstring details.

name: Crystal Heels
description: Transparent PVC heels with crystal embellishments. 10cm stiletto heel with cushioned insole.

name: Kebera Tote
description: Structured tote bag in pebbled leather. Gold-toned hardware with removable shoulder strap and interior zip pocket.

name: Midnight Wrap
description: Cashmere-blend wrap with brushed finish. Fringed edges and oversized fit for effortless layering.

name: Luna Bodycon
description: Bodycon midi dress in liquid stretch velvet. Scoop neckline with thin adjustable straps and back zip.
